text.message: Bit of an overreact but ok
Oh dude cant leave 8 4 like that
if some1 goes 8-4 my game is just over
Where do you go if youre me then?
Thats the same production without the 3:1
i'm out of this game for sure
Sling me your next brick and I go 8 3 instead?
Not the first brick just next
Orange is giving you a good deal
and you have maybe the best setup
no brick...but i'm the rob for sure
was not my block at all
enjoy the 12 sheep block i meant
i put the robber on 12 sheep
Damn the aggro knight for no reason
then you guys choose to black mail me
Hey i asked one time and backed off
Get me that ore back pls
lets all help orange win this game quickly
Ahah red is crushing me actually
red is actually helping you a lot
Well just now he blocked 4 wheat off my hand
After stealing my single precious brick
Wich i gave up settle to blue for
So all in all yeah thats brutal
I had city and he aggro knight to take it away ahah
6 cards plus the brick he yoinked from me now
Me trading you means me getting soloed
He is extorting me after crushing me
Well ill be in debt then
can we stop help oj win blue?
Well im not gonna block myself am I
can we pls rob the leader
Can help you settle here green
well im talking because you guys keep feed him the win
You mean solo as in the same you were doing before? Lol
they all want you to win
We have 2 on army 2 on road
Think green got smth good here
i have the win in hand
Red has to admit this has turned out into a pretty good game
i take road and army both
Im getting hit way too much
i dont know why blue robbed me ?
